//: Bob MODELS file — the ONLY place per-agent models are defined.
//models: Format: <provider>/<model>. Provider creds are NOT here — connect providers via /connect in the TUI (writes ~/.local/share/mimocode/auth.json). Skill keys (firecrawl, context7) live in bob.env.
//completion: Completion-controller: auto-continue loop after subagent tasks. Most fields are safe defaults; tune max_auto_continues or set enabled:false to disable.
//memory: Memory-consolidation passes. Only intervals are tunable here; the model is pinned to Bob's model automatically. auto=false disables a pass.
